generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hosts motor actuation (Vedder Electronic Speed Controller) and steering servo control for real-time vehicle navigation on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance VedderSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands to motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for ACC implementation"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem
]

instance SteeringServoController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Adjusts steering angle for vehicle navigation based on ROS2 steering commands"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem
]

instance LowerLevelChassisController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Handles real-time control of speed and steering for safety-critical operations on Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D point cloud sensor providing object detection data via Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing stereo vision for 3D perception in autonomous vehicle environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraPointCloudData
]

instance ROS2SensorFusionModule : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ROS2-based sensor fusion module integrating LiDAR and camera data via Python/C++/MATLAB/Simulink for real-time object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData FusedObjectTracksData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance FusedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ROS2SensorFusionModule
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR point clouds for object segmentation and detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2SensorFusionModule
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for real-time object tracking from fused sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2SensorFusionModule
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data of ego vehicle speed and steering angle measured via speed controller and steering servo"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateTransmission
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from sensor fusion including position, velocity, and size information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FusedObjectTracksData
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental context data representing projected driving path derived from sensor fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FusedObjectTracksData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LowerLevelChassisController
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication between vehicle, cloud, and UI components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer platform for on-board processing and real-time execution of vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK providing hardware abstraction and development tools for Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for rapid prototyping of sensor processing and data visualization components"
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language with ROS2 node lifecycle management for critical vehicle control components"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for sensor fusion algorithms and model development"
]

instance OpenGLRendering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OpenGL-based 3D rendering framework for visualizing vehicle and environment in real-time"
]

instance PostgreSQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL SQL database for storing object tracks and ego vehicle state data externally to vehicle"
]

instance CloudInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote cloud infrastructure for computation offloading and data storage of ACC control logic"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D rendering of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, detected object tracks, and projected driving path via User Interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Off-board computation service executing ACC control logic in cloud infrastructure to reduce on-board ECU load"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User-controlled remote management service enabling ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides UserControlledCommandsAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reporting service generating vehicle state and object track reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportsInsight
]

instance SimulationExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical experimentation service for ACC validation through simulated scenarios and edge case testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationTestingAction
]

instance CloudACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cloud-based ACC control service implementing performance-class I ACC (ISO 15622) for lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving path for operator monitoring"
]

instance ACCControlExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic execution of ACC control logic based on lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UserControlledCommandsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-controlled commands to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TimeSeriesReportsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports of vehicle state and detected object tracks for development troubleshooting"
]

instance SimulationTestingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of simulated scenarios to validate ACC performance in edge cases"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of lead vehicles for ACC performance-class I implementation (ISO 15622)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Entity Architecture
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting sensor processing (LiDAR clustering, tracking), data pre-processing, and actuation components on Jetson Orin Nano"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, ROS2SensorFusionModule,
                     JetsonOrinNanoActuationSystem, VedderSpeedController, SteeringServoController,
                     LowerLevelChassisController, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic on cloud/remote infrastructure"
    base:contains CloudACCService, PostgreSQLDatabase, ROS2Middleware
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity providing visualization and control panel interfaces for remote operation"
    base:contains OpenGLRendering, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands to the physical twin via Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) to the ROS2 nodes on the vehicle, including: (1) **Remote ACC management**: enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking (via ROS2 topics), (2) **Actuation commands**: desired speed (converted to motor voltage by the **Actuation FE**), and (3) **Data offloading**: ACC control logic (ACC Determining FE) computes following speed based on lead vehicle distance and sends it to the vehicle for actuation. The system adheres to ISO 15622 ACC standards for performance class I."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at real-time scales with:
  - **Perception cycle frequency**: Object tracks are updated every perception cycle (implied frequency ~10–30 Hz for LiDAR-based tracking).
  - **Latency constraint**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V communication requirement).
  - **Clock synchronization**: All components must share a time reference with ≤100 ms accuracy for event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **multi-layered entity-based system** following ISO 23247, with the following orchestration: (1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera), actuation, and lower-level control (ROS2 nodes on Jetson Orin Nano), (2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic (cloud-based), (3) **User Entity**: Provides real-time visualization (3D rendering) and remote management (control panel) via Wi-Fi network, (4) **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data serialization/unit conversion. The system uses ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication (UDP-based)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans two lifecycle phases:
  1. **Design/Development Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform to simulate ACC logic, validate ISO 15622 compliance, and prototype remote management features.
  2. **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, optimization, and health management of the ACC system during vehicle operation (e.g., fuel economy improvements, predictive maintenance insights)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs:
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication (e.g., between DT Entity and User Entity).
  - **Latency Requirements**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V standard) for real-time operation.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Components synchronized to ≤100 ms accuracy (NTP-like mechanism implied) for event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted/deployed across two primary environments: (1) **On-Board Deployment**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer (Physical Twin Entity) for sensor fusion, actuation, and real-time control, (2) **Cloud Deployment**: Remote servers for computation offloading (ACC control logic), data storage (SQL databases), and report generation (Digital Twin Entity). The **User Entity** runs on a remote UI (e.g., web dashboard) for visualization and control panel access. Deployment follows a **modular ROS2 package** structure, with each FE instantiated as a separate node."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Stores ego vehicle state data externally (e.g., cloud database) for analytics and compliance validation (e.g., ISO 15622).
  - **V2V Standards**: Adheres to 3GPP V2V communication requirements (≤100 ms latency) for inter-vehicle coordination (though not directly integrated with other vehicles)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: (1) **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twin entities (Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, Data Translation FE), (2) **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control standards for ACC control logic (performance class I), (3) **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication requirements (latency ≤100ms), (4) **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, (5) **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK**: Software development kit for Jetson Orin Nano deployment, (6) **ISO/IEC 30173**: Concepts and terminology (used for context but not directly implemented). Deviations from ISO 23247 include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin includes safety and security considerations:
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators retain control via remote management (e.g., emergency braking commands).
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency ensures safe operation (3GPP V2V standard).
  - **Safety-Critical Paths**: ACC logic is executed on cloud/remote hardware to offload resource-constrained ECUs, reducing risk of local failures.
  - **No explicit encryption/validation details**: Security mechanisms (e.g., TLS, ROS2 lifecycle validation) are not described in the provided text."
]
